welcome.html-content:
ScriptToScreen v1.1.0

AI Filmmaking Plugin for DaVinci Resolve

This installer will set up:

  • ScriptToScreen wizard + all standalone tools in DaVinci Resolve
  • Python virtual environment with AI packages
  • MLX-Audio for local voice synthesis (Apple Silicon)
  • Homebrew and ffmpeg if not already installed

After installation, restart DaVinci Resolve and go to
Workspace → Scripts → ScriptToScreen

Install log: ~/Library/Logs/ScriptToScreen/install.log

conclusion.html-content:
Installation Complete!

Next steps:

  1. Restart DaVinci Resolve
  2. Go to Workspace → Scripts → ScriptToScreen
  3. Configure your API keys in the wizard's Step 1:
    • Grok (xAI) — x.ai
    • ElevenLabs — elevenlabs.io
    • Kling AI — klingai.com

If something didn't work, check the log at:
~/Library/Logs/ScriptToScreen/install.log
